metadata.stressSource: Agricultural irrigation withdrawals, municipal consumption, and industrial effluent.
metadata.ecologicalImportance: Supports over 140 fish species, 90 amphibian species, and the Endangered Gangetic Dolphin.
metadata.dominantLandUse: Agriculture (crop cultivation represents >70% of basin area)
metadata.primaryThreats: Over-extraction of water, pollution from agricultural runoff (pesticides, fertilizers), and untreated municipal sewage.
metadata.seasonalVariation: Monsoon peak flows (July-September) account for over 80% of annual runoff, followed by severe dry-season low flows.

metadata.stressSource: Hyper-arid climate, high groundwater abstraction, and textile dyeing industrial discharges.
metadata.ecologicalImportance: Key ephemeral river system supporting desert biodiversity and migrating waterfowl in the Rann of Kutch.
metadata.dominantLandUse: Pastoral grazing, rainfed agriculture, and wasteland.
metadata.primaryThreats: Desertification, severe water scarcity, and industrial pollution from textile clusters.
metadata.seasonalVariation: Highly ephemeral; flows only during brief monsoon showers, remaining dry for most of the year.

metadata.stressSource: Intensive paddy and sugarcane irrigation, municipal water drafts for major cities like Bengaluru.
metadata.ecologicalImportance: Critical corridor linking Western Ghats and Eastern Ghats, supporting rich riparian forests and endemic species.
metadata.dominantLandUse: Agricultural crop cultivation, agroforestry, and riparian forests.
metadata.primaryThreats: Inter-state water sharing conflicts, agricultural runoff, and catchment forest deforestation.
metadata.seasonalVariation: Regulated heavily by dams; experiences southwest monsoon (June-September) and northeast monsoon (October-December) replenishment.

metadata.stressSource: Massive canal irrigation network in Punjab (Green Revolution crop belt) and transboundary drafts.
metadata.ecologicalImportance: Supports dense riverine wetlands and agricultural plains critical for migratory flyways.
metadata.dominantLandUse: Intensive agricultural crop cultivation (>75% land cover in Punjab plains)
metadata.primaryThreats: Groundwater over-exploitation, soil salinity, and heavy chemical pesticide runoff.
metadata.seasonalVariation: Glacial meltwaters drive high spring/summer flows, supplemented by monsoon rainfall, while winters are dry.

metadata.stressSource: Agricultural abstractions, industrial clusters in Maharashtra, and coal mining discharge.
metadata.ecologicalImportance: Supports rich tropical dry deciduous forests and provides deltaic breeding grounds for marine and freshwater species.
metadata.dominantLandUse: Agriculture, dry deciduous forestry, and coal mining areas.
metadata.primaryThreats: Forest clearing for agricultural expansion, damming of river tributaries, and industrial mining runoff.
metadata.seasonalVariation: Highly monsoonal; experiences extreme floods during June-September and very low flows during winter and summer.
